objective: Prove the harness clean-run flow against a real backend file by making one minimal, non-behavioral product change inside apps/backend/build.gradle.kts.
blocking_rule: If any required input or contract field is ambiguous, stop and write BLOCKED instead of guessing.
in_scope: Author and freeze a sprint contract for a product-scope proof run.
Capture baseline through gate-generator before touching the backend file.
Add one clarifying non-behavioral comment to apps/backend/build.gradle.kts.
out_of_scope: Changing backend runtime behavior or dependency versions.
Touching any other product file outside apps/backend/build.gradle.kts.
Editing harness core files as part of this proof run.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The run completes via create-run, validate-contract, freeze-contract, gate-generator, and gate-close without manual manifest edits.
A real backend file is changed only after baseline capture and stays within touched paths.

evaluator_checks: Changed files stayed within touched paths.
Every acceptance criterion has concrete evidence.
